heading: Agriculture Innovation Center Demonstration Program
label: 1632b Agriculture Innovation Center Demonstration Program

children.text: technical assistance, consisting of engineering services, applied research, scale production, and similar services, to enable the agricultural producers to establish businesses to produce value-added agricultural commodities or products;
assistance in marketing, market development, and business planning; and
organizational, outreach, and development assistance to increase the viability, growth, and sustainability of businesses that produce value-added agricultural commodities or products.

children.heading: Program
children.label: 1 Program
children.text: The term “Program” means the Agriculture Innovation Center Demonstration Program established under subsection (c).

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 2 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.
make grants to assist eligible entities in establishing Agriculture Innovation Centers to enable agricultural producers to obtain the assistance described in subsection (a); and
provide assistance to eligible entities in establishing Agriculture Innovation Centers through the research and technical services of the Department of Agriculture.

children.label: i
children.text: has provided services similar to the services described in subsection (a); or

children.label: ii
children.text: demonstrates the capability of providing such services;

children.label: i
children.text: the support for the entity in the agricultural community;

children.label: ii
children.text: the technical and other expertise of the entity; and

children.label: iii
children.text: the goals of the entity for increasing and improving the ability of local agricultural producers to develop markets and processes for value-added agricultural commodities or products;

children.label: C
children.text: the entity demonstrates that adequate resources (in cash or in kind) are available, or have been committed to be made available, to the entity, to increase and improve the ability of local agricultural producers to develop markets and processes for value-added agricultural commodities or products; and

children.label: D
children.text: the Agriculture Innovation Center of the entity has a board of directors established in accordance with paragraph (2).

children.label: A
children.text: Two general agricultural organizations with the greatest number of members in the State in which the eligible entity is located.

children.label: B
children.text: The department of agriculture, or similar State department or agency, or a State legislator, of the State in which the eligible entity is located.

children.label: C
children.text: Four entities representing commodities produced in the State.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to subsection (g), under the Program, the Secretary shall make, on a competitive basis, annual grants to eligible entities.

children.label: B
children.text: twice the dollar amount of the resources (in cash or in kind) that the eligible entity demonstrates are available, or have been committed to be made available, to the eligible entity in accordance with subsection (d)(1)(C).

children.heading: First fiscal year of Program
children.label: A First fiscal year of Program
children.text: In the first fiscal year of the Program, the Secretary shall make grants to not more than 5 eligible entities.

children.heading: Second fiscal year of Program
children.label: B Second fiscal year of Program
i
children.text: the eligible entities to which grants were made under subparagraph (A); and

children.label: ii
children.text: not more than 10 additional eligible entities.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Subject to subparagraph (B), in the first 3 fiscal years of the Program, the Secretary shall not make a grant under the Program to more than 1 entity in any 1 State.

children.heading: Collaboration
children.label: B Collaboration
children.text: Nothing in subparagraph (A) precludes a recipient of a grant under the Program from collaborating with any other institution with respect to activities conducted using the grant.
Applied research.
Consulting services.
Hiring of employees, at the discretion of the board of directors of the Agriculture Innovation Center of the eligible entity.

The making of matching grants, each of which shall be in an amount not to exceed $5,000, to agricultural producers, except that the aggregate amount of all such matching grants made by the eligible entity shall be not more than $50,000.
Legal services.
Any other related cost, as determined by the Secretary.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: g Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $15,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2019 through 2023.
